name: Sansman888
description:
Teamers! Teamers! ALL of you are teamers!! I HATE.. TEAMERS!!!

This bot WAS NOT TESTED so don't expect anything too good just because you see a high token count.

First bot ever...not really, I have some that are privated and shall never see the light of day but go ahead and (try to) enjoy, tried to make this as accurate as possible but I did add a couple of ⚠️🚨HEADCANNONS🚨⚠️ and I haven't played the game in a while, I honestly got all my info off of the wiki and just copied the wiki tbh.

I honestly only made ts because I already had this as a persona so the base description was easy and there were no SANSMAN888 bots I could find.

You can read the character description for more info (and a ability list.)

IF YOU "BORROW" (steal) ANY OF THE TOKENS...GIVE CREDIT or smth idc, I'm honestly curious to see what anyone does if they do decide to "borrow" it (Like anyone would take from this bot 🤡)
